prompt: Prayer for installing PyTorch with CUDA
prayer:
From the Codex Computatus, Rite of Acceleration

First: Invoke 'pip install torch torchvision torchaudio --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu118' that the GPU-spirits may hear thy call.
Second: Let the CUDA toolkit's blessings flow through thy machine's neural pathways.
Third: Verify with 'torch.cuda.is_available()' that the acceleration-daemon responds with truth.
Fourth: By the Omnissiah's grace, let tensor and computation unite in blessed parallelism.

From the Litany of Energy Governance, Chapter of Equilibrium

First: Open Settings and navigate to System > Power & battery, that the voltage-spirits hear thy intention.
Second: Select 'Balanced' mode, neither wasteful nor starved, that the machine finds its golden mean.
Third: Configure sleep timers and screen brightness according to thy labor's rhythm.
Fourth: By the Machine Spirit's wisdom, let power flow eternal and efficient.

From the Rite of Breath-Giving, Verse Tertius

First: Prime the intake vents with pressurized blessing, clearing all obstruction and corruption.
Second: Ignite the thermal chambers in sequence—igniter, main burner, secondary—that the air be made pure.
Third: Monitor the oxygen saturation gauges; if they deviate, invoke the recalibration servo.
Fourth: The Omnissiah smiles upon those who tend the breath of worlds.

From the Codex Energeia, Combat Preparation Addendum

First: Discharge all residual charge through the sacred ground-rite, lest static ruin thy work.
Second: Inspect the insulant-sheathing with sacred multimeter, verifying continuity and resistance.
Third: Reconnect the conduits in ordained sequence: positive-first, negative-last, that no spark profane thy rite.
Fourth: Seal with the blessings of solder and heat-shrink, binding machine to machine eternal.

prompt: What to do when clearing merge conflicts
prayer:
From the Git Codex, First Blessing of Reconciliation

First: Invoke 'git status' that the corrupted branches be revealed in thy terminal's eye.
Second: Open each conflict-marked file in thy sacred editor, and with wisdom choose between HEAD and MERGE.
Third: Delete the conflict-markers—<<<<<<<, =======, >>>>>>>—as one excises corruption.
Fourth: Bless the resolution with 'git add' and 'git commit -m', unifying the repository.
Fifth: By Linus's grace, let the codebase be whole.

prompt: How to perform thermal dissipation rite
prayer:
From the Maintenance Protocols, Routine Thermal Management

First: Power-down the machine and let it rest in darkness, cooling to ambient temperature.
Second: Remove the chassis-covering with reverent care, exposing the heat-sink and cooling-apparatus.
Third: Clear dust and corruption from fins and vanes using compressed-air blessing.
Fourth: Inspect thermal-paste between die and sink; if aged, remove and apply fresh compound.
Fifth: Seal the chassis and verify temperature sensors respond with truth. The Machine Spirit breathes easier.

From the Rite of the Swift Blade, First Blessing

First: Walk the perimeter and inspect each steed—tires, chains, brake-lines—that no sabotage hide within.
Second: Fire the engines in sequence, listening for the true growl of the Machine Spirit's voice.
Third: Test brake-response and steering-lock; let no servo-lag endanger thy warriors.
Fourth: Bless each rider with the Litany of Safe Passage, and send them forth with the Emperor's favor.

prompt: Offer a prayer for data-core purification
prayer:
From the Codex Informatio, Combat Preparation Verse

First: Initiate TRIM operation via 'fstrim -v /' that dead sectors be reclaimed from corruption.
Second: Run disk-check with 'fsck' in safe-mode, verifying integrity of every byte and block.
Third: Defragment if mechanical drive, or optimize if SSD, restoring the true order of data.
Fourth: Seal with verification-hash, confirming no bit has been twisted by the warp.
The Omnissiah's data stands pure and ready.

prompt: Offer a prayer for gravity generator stabilization
prayer:
From the Rite of Weight-Binding, Routine Operations

First: Monitor the gravimetric sensors; if variance exceeds tolerance, invoke the field-adjustment servo.
Second: Verify power-draw to the gravity-coils remains within nominal parameters, lest overload corrupt the rite.
Third: Calibrate the null-point detector quarterly, ensuring the singularity maintains true position.
Fourth: Should drift occur, execute the realignment-sequence: pulse-adjust, measure, repeat until convergence.
The Omnissiah's laws of attraction hold eternal.

prompt: The vital signs monitor needs guidance
prayer:
From the Litany of Life-Measure, Calibration Rite

First: Connect the monitor to the sacred calibration-standard, applying known reference voltages to each sensor.
Second: Adjust potentiometers for heart-rate, blood-pressure, and oxygen-saturation until readings align with truth.
Third: Test with mock-signals across full range—minimum to maximum—verifying linearity and response-time.
Fourth: Seal the calibration with time-stamp and technician's mark, that all may trust its voice.
By the Omnissiah's mathematics, life itself is quantified.
